text: A toaster is a small appliance used to brown bread and similar foods
original_text: A toaster is a small appliance used to brown bread and similar foods.

text: toasters use electric heating elements to toast food surfaces

text: A toaster can make bread crispier, warmer, and more emotionally convincing

text: toasters usually include slots, a lever, a timer, and crumb collection
